name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: Philadelphia, PA residents on West Girard Ave can reach Western Union Money Order Only for check-cashing and money order services.
description_long:
Western Union Money Order Only at 180 W Girard Ave in Philadelphia, PA operates as a standalone check-cashing service open 8 AM–10 PM daily. Located in Philadelphia's neighborhood, this location serves residents seeking reliable money order and check-cashing services. The venue maintains consistent hours throughout the week to meet the needs of Philadelphia residents.

At 180 W Girard Ave, Western Union Money Order Only offers comprehensive money order services and check-cashing transactions. To inquire about specific services or to verify requirements, call +1 215-574-2922. The staff can confirm current hours and answer questions about document needs.

When you need to cash a check or send a money order, bring a valid government-issued ID and any relevant documentation. Visit anytime during the week—the service operates from 8 AM to 10 PM every day. Western Union Money Order Only provides accessible financial services for Philadelphia residents and visitors.
pros: 150+ agent locations in Philadelphia alone, providing extensive accessibility
Extended hours at many locations (open until 10 PM-11:59 PM), accommodating working consumers
Partnerships with major retailers (Walgreens, 7-Eleven, Acme) for convenient access
Multi-language support in 6 languages including Spanish, Haitian Creole, and Vietnamese
Real-time transfer tracking capability via website and mobile
Loyalty rewards program (Western Union Rewards) for repeat customers
Specialized services including inmate payment and mobile top-up options
cons: Website provides no fee schedule or pricing information to compare costs
No transfer speed or delivery timeframe details disclosed on the location pages
Requires visit to physical agent location—no fully remote transaction capability
Limited information about fraud protection, dispute resolution, or refund policies
Service availability depends on agent hours; not all locations operate 24/7
best_for: Immigrants and international families sending money to relatives abroad
Consumers without traditional bank accounts needing cash access and bill payment
Individuals seeking convenient money transfer at extended-hours retail locations
Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, or Vietnamese-speaking consumers
diagnosis: Western Union is best for consumers needing convenient access to money transfer and cash services through an extensive retail network, particularly those without traditional bank accounts or sending money internationally. The main caveat is that the publicly available information lacks critical consumer decision factors like fees, delivery speeds, and fraud protections—consumers must contact specific agent locations or visit WU.com directly for pricing details before committing to a transaction.
meta_description: Philadelphia, PA: Western Union Money Order Only at 180 W Girard Ave offers check-cashing and money orders daily 8 AM–10 PM.
